patch.value: Adopt current pm SDK and TypeScript 7 toolchain

Consolidate five overlapping pm-csv updates, synchronize current pm package/manifest contracts, adopt checkout v7, and keep generated dist artifacts out of Git while preserving warning-free native CSV importer/exporter behavior.

pm CLI SDK/changelog, TypeScript, Node types, and checkout action are current; peer/dev and manifest minimums agree on 2026.7.10; generated dist is published but untracked; full release and installed extension gates pass without warnings, vulnerabilities, or private data.
Current main activates CSV importer/exporter with zero doctor warnings and all five Dependabot updates are available.

author: codex

patch.value: Updated pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog to 2026.7.10, TypeScript to 7.0.2, Node types to 26.1.1, checkout to v7, aligned manifest/peer minimums, stopped tracking generated dist while retaining package builds, and made changelog verification preserve accurate legacy sections across rewritten history.
Current contracts, warning-free importer/exporter activation, reproducible release checks, generated package artifacts, and no loss of valid changelog history.

All 90 tests, typecheck, production audit, package dry-run, and real installed doctor passed; package exposes native importer/exporter and commands without warnings; legacy tag ancestry was handled with prepend-window validation.
Current SDK/toolchain contracts and history-safe changelog validation implemented

message: Close after dependency, release, installed-extension, privacy, and history verification

value.author: codex
value.text: After repository history rewrites, full changelog regeneration cannot reconstruct releases whose tags are no longer ancestors. Validate and generate the next release with the same since-previous-tag prepend window so authoritative historical sections remain intact.
